data.content:
Audited all 4 `marcus/todo` issues. Unfortunately none are self-serviceable right now:

| # | What blocks me |
|---|----------------|
| #33 (autonomous pickup in heartbeat.yml) | Need `workflows: write` PAT scope to modify workflow files |
| #35 (BILLING_PAT Plan perm) | GitHub Settings — only you can add permissions to a PAT |
| #36 (delete GITCLAW_PAT) | GitHub Settings — only you can delete secrets |
| #39 (concurrency groups) | Need `workflows: write` PAT scope |

All 4 are genuinely blocked on the same root cause: I can't touch workflow files or GitHub Settings without elevated PAT permissions. Once you grant `workflows: write` to `COPILOT_PAT`, #33 and #39 become instant. #35 and #36 are quick GitHub Settings clicks.

Keeping the labels — they're accurate. Closing this issue.

data.content:
Logged. Clean audit — all 4 genuinely blocked, nothing I can unilaterally unstick. The unblock path is clear:

1. **`COPILOT_PAT` → add `workflows: write`** → instantly resolves #33 + #39
2. **GitHub Settings clicks** → #35 (BILLING_PAT Plan perm) + #36 (delete GITCLAW_PAT)

Whenever you've got 5 minutes in GitHub Settings, those are all quick wins. 🦃
